primary.description: Deep Ocean Blue - Trust, Depth, Headers

accent.description: Jungle Green - Success, Eco-Impact, Map Markers

textures.noise: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 200 200' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='noiseFilter'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='0.65' numOctaves='3' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23noiseFilter)' opacity='0.05'/%3E%3C/svg%3E")
textures.topography: Subtle topographic map SVG overlay on background sections

glassmorphism.usage: Sticky Nav, Map Overlays, Floating Action Buttons

dashboard.rules: Asymmetrical cards. Hero card spans 2 cols, 2 rows. Use 'h-full' on children.

landing.rules: Overlap elements using negative margins. Don't fill every cell.

buttons.primary: bg-secondary text-white hover:bg-secondary/90 shadow-button rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-bold transition-transform hover:-translate-y-0.5
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-primary border-2 border-primary/10 hover:border-primary/30 hover:bg-primary/5 rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-bold

cards.base: bg-white rounded-2xl border border-border/40 shadow-card hover:shadow-lg transition-all duration-300

inputs.base: bg-white border-2 border-muted focus:border-primary rounded-xl px-4 py-3 outline-none transition-colors

planning.alt: Group friends looking at map city street

transit.alt: Family walking in airport with luggage

instructions_to_main_agent: INSTALL FONTS: Add '@fontsource/outfit' and '@fontsource/dm-sans' to package.json immediately.
TAILWIND CONFIG: Update tailwind.config.js with the colors and border radius defined above.
GLOBAL CSS: Add the noise texture to the body background in index.css.
SHADCN: Customize all Shadcn components to use 'rounded-xl' or 'rounded-2xl' instead of default 'rounded-md'.
ICONS: Use 'lucide-react' for UI icons, but use 'phosphor-icons' (Duotone) for feature highlights if possible.
MAPS: Use 'react-map-gl' or 'leaflet' with a custom style that matches the 'Warm Sand' background (no default Google Maps look).
MOTION: Use 'framer-motion' for page transitions and staggered list entrances. No static pages.
TESTING: Add 'data-testid' to all interactive elements.
universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients for backgrounds, use solid colors or subtle textures.
Ensure all text has sufficient contrast (APCA/WCAG AA).
Use 2-3x more padding than you think is necessary.
Never use generic 'Lorem Ipsum'. Use travel-themed placeholder text.
Mobile-first: Ensure touch targets are at least 44px.
